listening_stats.play_count: integer — how many times this period
listening_stats.peak_play_hour: integer 0-23 — most common hour this was played

tags: array of strings from song profile tags

selection_reason.reason_type: enum: highest_repeat | emotional_match | persona_trigger | late_night_anchor | first_play_of_period
selection_reason.reason_copy: string — human sentence explaining why this song was chosen e.g. 'Played 7 times. Always after midnight.'

copy.headline: string | null — optional card headline
copy.body: string — 1-2 lines about what this song meant in context of the week
